news.title:
TTK Prestige and Stove Kraft rose up to 6.6% on gas supply concerns after Israel's strike on Iran's South Pars gas field.
Shares of Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals fell, while analysts see growth potential in induction cookers amid LPG disruption.
news.summary:
TTK Prestige and Stove Kraft rose up to 6.6% on gas supply concerns after Israel's strike on Iran's South Pars gas field.
Shares of Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals fell, while analysts see growth potential in induction cookers amid LPG disruption.

news.title:
Whirlpool of India Ltd completed acquisition of 3.18% equity in Elica India.
The acquisition raises Whirlpool's total shareholding in Elica India to 100%.
news.summary:
Whirlpool of India Ltd completed acquisition of 3.18% equity in Elica India.
The acquisition raises Whirlpool's total shareholding in Elica India to 100%.

news.title:
Bata India, Whirlpool of India, and Zee Ent. dropped to Covid-era lows despite Nifty50's 250% surge.
These Nifty500 stocks face weak revenues and mixed analyst ratings amid broader market gains.
news.summary:
Bata India, Whirlpool of India, and Zee Ent. dropped to Covid-era lows despite Nifty50's 250% surge.
These Nifty500 stocks face weak revenues and mixed analyst ratings amid broader market gains.

news.title:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.
news.summary:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.

news.title:
Whirlpool of India Ltd signed 30-year brand license and tech agreements with Whirlpool US.
Revenue grew 4%, EBITDA rose 47%, and profitability improved despite intense competition.
news.summary:
Whirlpool of India Ltd signed 30-year brand license and tech agreements with Whirlpool US.
Revenue grew 4%, EBITDA rose 47%, and profitability improved despite intense competition.

news.title:
Whirlpool's Elica unit aims for strong double-digit revenue growth.
Company may accept lower PBT margins to support this expansion.
news.summary:
Whirlpool's Elica unit aims for strong double-digit revenue growth.
Company may accept lower PBT margins to support this expansion.

news.title:
Whirlpool explores capital utilization for operations, new projects, and market opportunities.
Targeting payback periods of 2-4 years, leveraging strong cash position.
news.summary:
Whirlpool explores capital utilization for operations, new projects, and market opportunities.
Targeting payback periods of 2-4 years, leveraging strong cash position.

news.title:
Whirlpool of India reported a 40% YoY drop in Q3 PAT, with EBITDA rising 31.2% YoY to Rs 90.9 crore.
Its scrip rose 1.05%, trading at Rs 898.25 on BSE, consolidating market share in washers and refrigerators.
news.summary:
Whirlpool of India reported a 40% YoY drop in Q3 PAT, with EBITDA rising 31.2% YoY to Rs 90.9 crore.
Its scrip rose 1.05%, trading at Rs 898.25 on BSE, consolidating market share in washers and refrigerators.

news.title:
Whirlpool India anticipates high single to double-digit revenue CAGR.
Focus areas include premium products and innovation to drive growth.
news.summary:
Whirlpool India anticipates high single to double-digit revenue CAGR.
Focus areas include premium products and innovation to drive growth.

news.title:
Whirlpool of India schedules Q3 FY 2025-26 earnings call on Feb 12, 2026, at 4 PM.
Conference call details, including dial-in numbers, are provided for investor participation.
news.summary:
Whirlpool of India schedules Q3 FY 2025-26 earnings call on Feb 12, 2026, at 4 PM.

news.title:
Whirlpool of India acquired 3.18% equity in Elica PB, now holding 100%.
This move aligns with Whirlpool's long-term growth in kitchen appliances.
news.summary:

news.title:
Whirlpool's Q3 net profit fell 39.8% to ₹26.5 crore, revenue rose 4% to ₹1,773 crore.
EBITDA grew 31.1% to ₹90.6 crore, with margins improving to 5.1% from 4% YoY.
news.summary:
Whirlpool's Q3 net profit fell 39.8% to ₹26.5 crore, revenue rose 4% to ₹1,773 crore.
EBITDA grew 31.1% to ₹90.6 crore, with margins improving to 5.1% from 4% YoY.

news.title:
Whirlpool of India approved Q3 and 9M results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Appointed Anil Berera as Independent Director, acquired 3.2% stake in subsidiary for INR 59 Cr.
news.summary:
Whirlpool of India approved Q3 and 9M results ending Dec 31, 2025.
Appointed Anil Berera as Independent Director, acquired 3.2% stake in subsidiary for INR 59 Cr.

news.title:

Mr. Jolly brings 25+ years of experience in legal, compliance, and corporate governance.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's Wealth Creation Study identifies 10 top wealth-destroying companies from 2020-2025, led by Rajesh Exports, which lost ₹10,500 crore.
Other major losers include Whirlpool, Bandhan Bank, Vodafone Idea, and Relaxo Footwear, all showing negative CAGR over the past five years.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal's Wealth Creation Study identifies 10 top wealth-destroying companies from 2020-2025, led by Rajesh Exports, which lost ₹10,500 crore.
Other major losers include Whirlpool, Bandhan Bank, Vodafone Idea, and Relaxo Footwear, all showing negative CAGR over the past five years.

news.title:
Advent's $1B deal to acquire a 31% stake in Whirlpool India collapsed due to valuation disagreements.
Whirlpool India faces competition from LG, Samsung, and stricter regulations; its shares fell 47% this year.
news.summary:
Advent's $1B deal to acquire a 31% stake in Whirlpool India collapsed due to valuation disagreements.
Whirlpool India faces competition from LG, Samsung, and stricter regulations; its shares fell 47% this year.

news.title:
Promoter stakes in Indian firms like IndiGo, Vedanta, and Whirlpool are falling, hitting an 8-year low by 2025. Reasons include debt repayment, high stock prices, SEBI's MPS rule, and personal diversification.
Investors should monitor promoter actions, FII/DII buying, and block deals via tools like Finology Ticker. Don't panic; assess reasons, buyers, and remaining stakes before reacting.
news.summary:
Promoter stakes in Indian firms like IndiGo, Vedanta, and Whirlpool are falling, hitting an 8-year low by 2025. Reasons include debt repayment, high stock prices, SEBI's MPS rule, and personal diversification.
Investors should monitor promoter actions, FII/DII buying, and block deals via tools like Finology Ticker. Don't panic; assess reasons, buyers, and remaining stakes before reacting.
